title: IWTweaks
body:
This is just a small datapack/mod intended to balance out [Immersive Weathering](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-weathering) a bit for survival. Still a work in progress, and primarily being made for my personal server.

Current changes:
- Permafrost - Reduce bone and nugget drops to 5% each. 
- All grass and dirt blocks - Reduce growth of grass, flowers, etc by 50%.
